Monkey_Puppet.description: A monkey puppet looking awkwardly away, used for situations where you are avoiding blame, hiding something, or acting innocent when you are guilty.

Drake rejecting.description: Drake rejecting something in the top panel and approving a usually controversial alternative in the bottom panel. A contrast meme.

Two_Buttons.description: A hero sweating while trying to push two difficult contradictory buttons. Used for situations where making a choice between two equally terrible or highly conflicting options is impossible.

Distracted_Boyfriend.description: A guy walking with his girlfriend but looking back at another girl. Used when you abandon a loyal responsibility in favor of a bad new habit or shiny object.
